narrative:
Norwalk Township has 2,139 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
